        print(f"  color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center=({(min(rows)+max(rows))//2},{(min(cols)+max(cols))//2})")
print("\nHollow diamonds:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] in ('O', 'p') and node['pixels'] < 10:
        b = node['boundary']
        print(f"  color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, center=({(min([p[0] for p in b])+max([p[0] for p in b]))//2},{(min([p[1] for p in b])+max([p[1] for p in b]))//2})")
